headerTitle: AI Systems Engineer  ·  LLM Security & Evaluation  ·  Production AI Engineering  ·  Agentic Systems
subjectText: AI Systems Engineer — Trail of Bits (Remote) · $125K–$250K
intro: Trail of Bits applies rigorous security research to AI systems — adversarial testing frameworks, model evaluation pipelines, LLM safety harnesses. The production AI engineering and evaluation discipline is live across 14 endpoints.
bullets: Production AI evaluation harnesses — input-output pair generation, edge case cataloguing, regression test sets, cross-model consistency checks (Claude vs GPT-4o). Catch prompt drift on model updates and flag output failures before they reach end users.

Agentic systems in production — 14 live endpoints using Claude and GPT-4o with tool-use, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, structured JSON contracts validated with Zod. Opinions on agent contract design: schemas, memory strategies, fallback behaviors.

Security-adjacent engineering mindset — every AI system built includes adversarial case handling: prompt injection patterns, hallucination edge cases, and graceful failure modes when LLM confidence is below threshold. HITL patterns implemented because AI systems fail unexpectedly in production.
matchNotes: Strong on eval harnesses, agentic systems, MCP, and Python/TypeScript stack. Security research domain is new — gap in cryptography, formal verification, and security audit methodology. Wide salary band ($125-250K) suggests senior IC range if matched well. Remote. Trail of Bits is a highly respected firm — worth applying even as a stretch on the security domain.
